message:
feat(ci): add matrix strategy for parallel Node.js API tests

- Run 8 modules in parallel (buffer, fs, path, crypto, util, process, events, timers)
- Generate per-module summaries instead of combined table
- Fix artifact naming for matrix outputs
- Reduce CI time by parallelizing test execution

This addresses the request to "add those and maybe make them run in parallel"

files.patch:
@@ -37,6 +37,10 @@ jobs:
   node-core-tests:
     runs-on: macos-latest
     timeout-minutes: 60
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        module: [buffer, fs, path, crypto, util, process, events, timers]
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
@@ -64,124 +68,53 @@ jobs:
           echo "Test files downloaded:"
           find test/parallel -name "*.js" | wc -l
 
-      - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - Buffer
-        id: test-buffer
+      - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - ${{ matrix.module }}
+        id: test
         run: |
-          ./scripts/run-node-core-tests.sh node-core buffer
-          passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          echo "buffer_passed=$passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "buffer_failed=$failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "buffer_skipped=$skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-
-      - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - File System
-        id: test-fs
-        run: |
-          ./scripts/run-node-core-tests.sh node-core fs
-          passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-fs.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-fs.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-fs.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          echo "fs_passed=$passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "fs_failed=$failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "fs_skipped=$skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-
-      - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - Path
-        id: test-path
-        run: |
-          ./scripts/run-node-core-tests.sh node-core path
-          passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-path.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-path.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-path.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          echo "path_passed=$passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "path_failed=$failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "path_skipped=$skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-
-      - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - Crypto
-        id: test-crypto
-        run: |
-          ./scripts/run-node-core-tests.sh node-core crypto
-          passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-crypto.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-crypto.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-crypto.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          echo "crypto_passed=$passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "crypto_failed=$failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "crypto_skipped=$skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          ./scripts/run-node-core-tests.sh node-core ${{ matrix.module }}
+          passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          echo "passed=$passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "failed=$failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "skipped=$skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
       - name: Generate Summary
         run: |
-          echo "# Node.js Core API Compatibility" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "Testing against official Node.js test suite from https://github.com/nodejs/node" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-
-          echo "## Results by Module" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Module | Passed | Failed | Skipped | Pass Rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "|--------|--------|--------|---------|-----------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-
-          # Buffer
-          buffer_total=$((${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_failed }}))
-          if [ $buffer_total -gt 0 ]; then
-            buffer_rate=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", (${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_passed }} / $buffer_total) * 100}")
+          MODULE="${{ matrix.module }}"
+          PASSED="${{ steps.test.outputs.passed }}"
+          FAILED="${{ steps.test.outputs.failed }}"
+          SKIPPED="${{ steps.test.outputs.skipped }}"
+          TOTAL=$((PASSED + FAILED))
+
+          if [ $TOTAL -gt 0 ]; then
+            RATE=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", ($PASSED / $TOTAL) * 100}")
           else
-            buffer_rate="N/A"
+            RATE="N/A"
           fi
-          echo "| Buffer | ${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_passed }} | ${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_failed }} | ${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_skipped }} | $buffer_rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          # File System
-          fs_total=$((${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_failed }}))
-          if [ $fs_total -gt 0 ]; then
-            fs_rate=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", (${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_passed }} / $fs_total) * 100}")
-          else
-            fs_rate="N/A"
-          fi
-          echo "| File System | ${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_passed }} | ${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_failed }} | ${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_skipped }} | $fs_rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          # Capitalize module name
+          MODULE_NAME=$(echo "$MODULE" | sed 's/.*/\u&/')
 
-          # Path
-          path_total=$((${{ steps.test-path.outputs.path_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-path.outputs.path_failed }}))
-          if [ $path_total -gt 0 ]; then
-            path_rate=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", (${{ steps.test-path.outputs.path_passed }} / $path_total) * 100}")
-          else
-            path_rate="N/A"
-          fi
-          echo "| Path | ${{ steps.test-path.outputs.path_passed }} | ${{ steps.test-path.outputs.path_failed }} | ${{ steps.test-path.outputs.path_skipped }} | $path_rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-
-          # Crypto
-          crypto_total=$((${{ steps.test-crypto.outputs.crypto_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-crypto.outputs.crypto_failed }}))
-          if [ $crypto_total -gt 0 ]; then
-            crypto_rate=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", (${{ steps.test-crypto.outputs.crypto_passed }} / $crypto_total) * 100}")
-          else
-            crypto_rate="N/A"
-          fi
-          echo "| Crypto | ${{ steps.test-crypto.outputs.crypto_passed }} | ${{ steps.test-crypto.outputs.crypto_failed }} | ${{ steps.test-crypto.outputs.crypto_skipped }} | $crypto_rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-
-          # Total
-          total_passed=$((${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-path.outputs.path_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-crypto.outputs.crypto_passed }}))
-          total_failed=$((${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_failed }} + ${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_failed }} + ${{ steps.test-path.outputs.path_failed }} + ${{ steps.test-crypto.outputs.crypto_failed }}))
-          total_skipped=$((${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_skipped }} + ${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_skipped }} + ${{ steps.test-path.outputs.path_skipped }} + ${{ steps.test-crypto.outputs.crypto_skipped }}))
-          total_tests=$((total_passed + total_failed))
+          echo "# Node.js $MODULE_NAME API Tests" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Passed** | $PASSED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Failed** | $FAILED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Skipped** | $SKIPPED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Pass Rate** | **$RATE** |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          if [ $total_tests -gt 0 ]; then
-            total_rate=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", ($total_passed / $total_tests) * 100}")
+          if [ $FAILED -gt 0 ]; then
+            echo "⚠️ **$FAILED test(s) failed** - see full logs for details" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           else
-            total_rate="N/A"
+            echo "✅ **All tests passed!**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi
 
-          echo "| **TOTAL** | **$total_passed** | **$total_failed** | **$total_skipped** | **$total_rate** |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-
-          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "## Compatibility Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "EdgeBox passes **$total_rate** of Node.js Core API tests." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "**Combined Coverage:**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "- ✅ ECMAScript (Test262): ~100% of ES2024 features" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "- ✅ Node.js APIs: $total_rate of core module tests" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-
       - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
-          name: node-core-test-results
+          name: node-core-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}
           path: |
-            test-results-*.txt
+            node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt
           retention-days: 90
